decompose.rationale: v0.1 spans four distinct capabilities (session readers, sanitizer engine, daemon+review UI, publish pipeline); too large to review as one diff. Slices are independently reviewable packages with clean interface boundaries.

children.scope: monorepo skeleton + @mosga/contracts (zod types + SCHEMA.md) + @mosga/session-readers (elftia extraction + CliSourceAdapter + Claude Code adapter)

children.note: started early per policy: prerequisite readers is implemented + review-clean (shared working tree sufficient); ship/archive of readers runs concurrently
children.scope: @mosga/sanitizer: gitleaks rule ingestion (RE2->JS), custom rules, 3-layer scan, deterministic pseudonym mapping, structure-aware traversal, report generation, non-text flagging
@mosga/daemon (local HTTP API + serve /ui) + @mosga/ui (React review interface: hit enumeration, batch replace, image flag preview, layered confirmation gate)
@mosga/publisher: schema export, mandatory local pre-check (shared 3-layer ruleset), GitHub PR flow, data-repo template (CI + canary tests + HF sync), INCIDENT-RESPONSE.md

notes: Strict serial chain: each child consumes the previous child's package interfaces. Conservative policy: no positive independence proof between adjacent slices (shared monorepo config, shared contracts package), so no parallelism. User pre-approved continuous run through gates ("全权推进，不用停下") — gates are reported, not blocked on.
